recommendations.title: Brahms: The Boy II
recommendations.overview: After a family moves into the Heelshire Mansion, their young son soon makes friends with a life-like doll called Brahms.

recommendations.title: Separation
recommendations.overview: A young girl finds solace in her artist father and the ghost of her dead mother.

recommendations.title: Lord of Misrule
recommendations.overview: When the daughter of the town's new priest goes missing during the harvest festival, a desperate search begins, uncovering the town's dark history and resurfacing tales of a mysterious, malevolent spirit that demands sacrifice.

recommendations.title: Orphan: First Kill

recommendations.title: The Boy
recommendations.overview: A young American woman takes a job as a nanny in a remote English village, soon discovering that the family's eight-year-old son is a life-sized doll that comes with a list of strict rules.

recommendations.title: The Devil Inside
recommendations.overview: In Italy, a woman becomes involved in a series of unauthorized exorcisms during her mission to discover what happened to her mother, who allegedly murdered three people during her own exorcism.

recommendations.title: Stay Alive

recommendations.title: The Whole Truth
recommendations.overview: A defense attorney works to get his teenage client acquitted of murdering his wealthy father.

recommendations.title: Arlington Road
